title: 用 AI Agent 把自然语言转成 SQL：三种方案的实验对比
summary_angle: 通过对比三种 NL-to-SQL 方案（Copilot CLI、Agent Framework、AI/BI Genie）的实验数据，揭示运行时查询验证和元数据是准确率的核心驱动力

information_blocks.anchor: 移除 query_db 工具后准确率从 76.92% 跌至 38.46%
information_blocks.visual: 一把剑被折断，代表失去运行时验证能力

information_blocks.anchor: Copilot CLI 80.77% vs Agent Framework 76.92% vs Genie 88.50%（含反馈）
information_blocks.visual: 三名侦探站在不同高度台阶上

information_blocks.anchor: 加入 domain hints 后 Claude Sonnet 4.5 从 66.70% 升至 80.77%
information_blocks.visual: 一把钥匙解锁隐藏数据

information_blocks.anchor: 剩余 ~25% 错误主要来自语义误解，不是 SQL 语法问题
information_blocks.visual: 墙壁上有裂缝，象征剩余障碍

main_subject: 一个 AI 侦探角色在数据库迷宫中，手持 SQL 查询卷轴，周围有运行时验证和元数据线索
subject_action: 侦探分析数据库模式，手写 SQL 查询，旁边显示准确率数字
composition: wide 2.35:1，左侧主焦点（侦探+数据库迷宫），右侧 2-3 个信息块叙事面板
background_elements: 数据库表格、SQL 代码片段、准确率数字、推理箭头
comic_style_reason: 文章是分析/对比型研究，涉及多个方案的冲突与判断，适合 american-comic 的粗轮廓、halftone 对照张力风格
color_palette: 深蓝+金色+白色，halftone 纹理，高对比度
prompt: Wide cover illustration, aspect ratio 2.35:1, american-comic style with bold outlines, halftone dots, high contrast. A detective character in a blue suit stands in a database maze holding a glowing SQL scroll, surrounded by database table grids. Left panel: the detective analyzing schema with magnifying glass, a broken sword labeled with small Chinese tag '无查询' nearby showing the collapse. Center panel: three stepping stones with accuracy numbers rising. Right panel: a key unlocking a data vault with small Chinese tag '领域提示'. Bottom-right: cracked wall with small label '业务逻辑'. Color: deep blue, gold, white halftone. No fake UI, no dashboard, no English slogans, no fake charts. 2-3 short Chinese labels maximum.
